# Code Of Conduct

## Our Standard

Participation in this project is expected to remain respectful, technically honest, and constructive.

Examples of expected behavior:

- discuss ideas directly without personal attacks;
- provide actionable technical feedback;
- document risks and tradeoffs clearly;
- respect maintainers, contributors, and users.

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- harassment or intimidation;
- abusive or discriminatory language;
- publishing private data or credentials;
- deliberately disruptive behavior in issues or pull requests.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove content, close discussions, or block participation when behavior damages the project or its contributors.

## Reporting

Use GitHub issues for now if moderation is needed. Avoid reposting harmful content when reporting it.
